records.question: Which female students with the last name Smith who are 18 or older, have an advisor number of at least 1121, and play games for exactly 1 hour?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT student.stuid FROM student
JOIN plays_games ON student.stuid = plays_games.stuid
WHERE student.advisor >= 1121 AND student.sex = 'F' AND plays_games.hours_played = 1 AND student.age >= 18 AND student.lname = 'Smith'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.StuID FROM Student AS T1 INNER JOIN Plays_Games AS T2 ON T1.StuID = T2.StuID WHERE T1.Sex = 'F' AND T1.LName = 'Smith' AND T1.Age >= 18 AND T1.Advisor >= 1121 AND T2.Hours_Played = 1

records.question: Which female students named Jandy Nelson, aged 20, living in BAL, with advisor 9172, majoring in 600 or fewer, have played games for at least 50 hours?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT student.stuid FROM student
JOIN plays_games ON student.stuid = plays_games.stuid
WHERE student.city_code = 'BAL' AND student.fname = 'Jandy' AND student.sex = 'F' AND student.major <= 600 AND student.age = 20 AND plays_games.hours_played >= 50 AND student.advisor = 9172 AND student.lname = 'Nelson'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.StuID FROM Student AS T1 INNER JOIN Plays_Games AS T2 ON T1.StuID = T2.StuID WHERE T1.Fname = 'Jandy' AND T1.LName = 'Nelson' AND T1.Age = 20 AND T1.city_code = 'BAL' AND T1.Advisor = 9172 AND T1.Major <= 600 AND T1.Sex = 'F' AND T2.Hours_Played >= 50

records.question: Which male students with the first name Derek and last name Lee have major 600 and an advisor number at most 2192?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT student.stuid FROM student
WHERE student.lname = 'Lee' AND student.advisor <= 2192 AND student.fname = 'Derek' AND student.major = 600 AND student.sex = 'M'
records.pred_sql: SELECT StuID FROM Student WHERE Sex = 'M' AND Fname = 'Derek' AND LName = 'Lee' AND Major = 600 AND Advisor <= 2192

records.question: Who are the students named Linda Smith majoring in 600 or more, playing Athletics without a scholarship, who play at least 35 hours and spend at most 2 hours per week on that sport?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT student.stuid FROM student
JOIN plays_games ON student.stuid = plays_games.stuid
JOIN sportsinfo ON student.stuid = sportsinfo.stuid
WHERE plays_games.hours_played >= 35 AND sportsinfo.onscholarship = 'N' AND sportsinfo.sportname = 'Athletics' AND sportsinfo.hoursperweek <= 2 AND student.lname = 'Smith' AND student.fname = 'Linda' AND student.major >= 600
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.StuID FROM Student AS T1 INNER JOIN SportsInfo AS T2 ON T1.StuID = T2.StuID WHERE T1.Fname = 'Linda' AND T1.LName = 'Smith' AND T1.Major >= 600 AND T2.SportName = 'Athletics' AND T2.OnScholarship = 'N' AND T2.GamesPlayed >= 35 AND T2.HoursPerWeek <= 2

records.question: Which students have played no more than 15 hours of games but have participated in at least 5 games overall?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT student.stuid FROM student
JOIN plays_games ON student.stuid = plays_games.stuid
JOIN sportsinfo ON student.stuid = sportsinfo.stuid
WHERE plays_games.hours_played <= 15 AND sportsinfo.gamesplayed >= 5
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.StuID FROM Plays_Games AS T1 JOIN SportsInfo AS T2 ON T1.StuID = T2.StuID GROUP BY T1.StuID HAVING SUM(T1.Hours_Played) <= 15 AND SUM(T2.GamesPlayed) >= 5

records.question: Which students from the city with code BAL play video games?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT student.stuid FROM student
JOIN plays_games ON student.stuid = plays_games.stuid
JOIN video_games ON plays_games.gameid = video_games.gameid
WHERE student.city_code = 'BAL'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.StuID FROM Student AS T1 JOIN Plays_Games AS T2 ON T1.StuID = T2.StuID WHERE T1.city_code = 'BAL'

records.gold_sql:
SELECT student.stuid FROM student
WHERE student.city_code = 'PIT' AND student.sex = 'M' AND student.advisor >= 1121 AND student.major = 600 AND student.fname = 'Michael' AND student.lname = 'Leighton'
records.pred_sql: SELECT StuID FROM Student WHERE Fname = 'Michael' AND LName = 'Leighton' AND Sex = 'M' AND Major = 600 AND city_code = 'PIT' AND Advisor >= 1121
